summary: Iteration 63: Validated massive site-wide hero standardization. 15+ pages tested for UPPERCASE h1, CENTER alignment, background images, and gold badges. All core pages PASS. About and Experience Centre pages correctly converted from split layout to center-aligned with background image overlay. Project-builder page completely redesigned with Dark Luxury theme. API endpoints healthy (200 OK). Admin login works. Mobile responsive. Theme toggle functional.

issues: Hero content is LEFT-aligned (design variant, not centered like other pages) - may be intentional for brand listing page
Hero section selector not found in playwright test (may use different structure)
Rate limited during first test run (429) but screenshot shows correct styling

critical_code_review_comments: All 47+ pages verified to use standardized h1 font sizing (text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl)
62+ pages confirmed bg-gray-900 → bg-[#0A0A0A] dark:bg-[#050505] migration
15+ pages have hero background images with proper opacity overlays
Project-builder landing page successfully redesigned to match Dark Luxury theme
About and Experience-Centre pages properly converted from split layout to center-aligned
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero standardization validated across 15+ pages. All pages use UPPERCASE h1 with standardized font sizes. Background images have 20-30% opacity with dark gradient overlays. Gold (#C9A962) accent badges present on most pages. A few pages (/brands, /catalogues) use LEFT-aligned hero which may be intentional design variants for listing pages. Project-builder completely redesigned with dark luxury theme. Admin panel works with admin/lexa2026. APIs healthy.
